reviews.comment:
Acá intentan ver cómo te engañan. Hay que tener cuidado. Los empleados del Automóvil Club Argentino son unos sinvergüenzas..

(Translated by Google)
Here they're trying to trick you. You have to be careful. The employees of the Argentine Automobile Club are scoundrels.

reviews.comment:
Un desastre la atención. Las cajeras apuradas, la espera larguísima. Tardaron más de media hora en entregar el pedido. Le pregunté cuánto iba a demorar y tampoco me supo responder. No la recomiendo para nada.

(Translated by Google)
The service was a disaster. The cashiers were rushed, and the wait was incredibly long. It took them over half an hour to deliver my order. I asked how long it would take, and they couldn't tell me. I absolutely do not recommend this place.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQtLXJmdU53EAE
